data.keyword: buy himalayan salt shot glasses for tequila

result.keyword: buy himalayan salt shot glasses for tequila

items.markdown:
Himalayan salt shot glasses are a popular choice for tequila lovers because they naturally add a subtle salty finish to the drink without the need for a messy rim . These glasses are typically hand-carved from food-grade pink salt and are naturally antibacterial.[[1]](https://steelcitysalt.com/products/pink-himalayan-salt-shot-glass#:~:text=Pink%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Shot%20Glass,dishwasher%20or%20submerge%20in%20water.)[[2]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Glasses-All-Natural-Approved-Tequila/dp/B00OQNJE6S#:~:text=Hand%20carved%20from%20the%20purest,Made%20in%20Pakistan.)[[3]](https://spices.com/products/the-spice-lab-tequila-shot-glasses-pink-himalayan-salt-tequila-shot-glasses-just-pour-shoot-and-bite-a-lime-naturally-anti-bacterial-perfect-for-your-bar-1#:~:text=JUST%20POUR%2C%20SHOOT%20&%20BITE%20A,your%20glasses%20in%20the%20freezer.)[[4]](https://blog.google/products/shopping/shopping-graph-explained/)

Top Product Recommendations

- **[The Spice Lab Tequila Himalayan Salt Shooters Gift Set](https://spices.com/products/the-spice-lab-tequila-shot-glasses-pink-himalayan-salt-tequila-shot-glasses-just-pour-shoot-and-bite-a-lime-naturally-anti-bacterial-perfect-for-your-bar-1)** : This comprehensive set includes **four shot glasses and two serving trays** (one wooden and one ceramic). It is highly rated and has been featured in major publications like *InStyle* and *The Food Network Magazine*.
	- **Price** : $39.95
- **[Black Tai Salt Co. Himalayan Salt Shot Glass - Set of 4](https://www.blacktaisaltco.com/products/himalayansaltshotglasssetof4defaulttitle?variant=1656943542301&country=US&currency=USD&utm_medium=product_sync&utm_source=google&utm_content=sag_organic&utm_campaign=sag_organic)** : These are described as **thick and durable** glasses designed for "real tequila lovers". Each glass holds approximately 2 oz of liquid and is carved from 100% authentic Himalayan salt.
	- **Price** : $19.99
- **[Himalayan Trading Co. Pink Himalayan Salt Shot Glass Set](https://himalayantradingco.com/products/pink-himalayan-salt-shot-glass-set)** : This set of four is a budget-friendly option currently offered at a significant discount. The glasses are **hand-carved from natural crystals** and are noted for their suitability for both tequila and individual appetizers.
	- **Price** : $24.97 (originally $50.00)
- **[NaturesArtifactsUSA Himalayan Pink Salt Tequila Shot Glasses](https://www.etsy.com/listing/785480255/himalayan-pink-salt-tequila-shot-glasses?gpla=1&gao=1&)** : Available on Etsy, these glasses are highly customizable as each is carved individually, leading to **unique color and mineral veining** for every piece.
	- **Price** : $18.71 (originally $24.95)[[1]](https://spices.com/products/the-spice-lab-tequila-shot-glasses-pink-himalayan-salt-tequila-shot-glasses-just-pour-shoot-and-bite-a-lime-naturally-anti-bacterial-perfect-for-your-bar-1#:~:text=Sale%20price,been%20added%20to%20the%20cart.)[[2]](https://spices.com/products/the-spice-lab-tequila-shot-glasses-pink-himalayan-salt-tequila-shot-glasses-just-pour-shoot-and-bite-a-lime-naturally-anti-bacterial-perfect-for-your-bar-1#:~:text=JUST%20POUR%2C%20SHOOT%20&%20BITE%20A,your%20glasses%20in%20the%20freezer.)[[3]](https://www.blacktaisaltco.com/products/himalayansaltshotglasssetof4defaulttitle#:~:text=Himalayan%20Salt%20Shot%20Glass%20-%20Set,100%25%20Himalayan%20Salt.)[[4]](https://blog.google/products/shopping/shopping-graph-explained/)[[5]](https://himalayantradingco.com/products/pink-himalayan-salt-shot-glass-set#:~:text=Contact%20Us-,BEST%20SALE%20OF%20THE%20YEAR%20Ends%20tonight%20%28upto%2060%25%20off,mezcal%20a%20delicious%2C%20salty%20finish.)[[6]](https://blog.google/products/shopping/shopping-graph-explained/)

Key Care & Usage Tips

- **Prevent Erosion** : Do not let tequila sit in the glass for more than a few seconds, or it will become overly salty and begin to erode the glass.
- **Cleaning**: **Never put them in the dishwasher** or submerge them in water. Simply wipe them clean with a damp cloth and air dry them.
- **Chilling** : For the best experience, store the glasses in the **freezer** before serving to provide a perfectly chilled shot.[[1]](https://steelcitysalt.com/products/pink-himalayan-salt-shot-glass#:~:text=Pink%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Shot%20Glass,dishwasher%20or%20submerge%20in%20water.)[[2]](https://www.amazon.com/Salt-Shot-Glasses-Himalayan-Requirements/dp/B017PMDVGK#:~:text=ordinary%20table%20salt.-,No%20need%20to%20salt%20the%20glass%20rim%2C%20or%20deal%20with,for%20many%20parties%20to%20come!&text=Unlike%20competitor's%20salt%20shot%20glasses,%2C%20we'll%20replace%20them.)[[3]](https://sweetwaterlabsnyc.com/products/pure-pink-natural-salt-shot-glasses#:~:text=Products%20are%20automatically%20delivered%20on,or%20cancel%20your%20subscription%20anytime.&text=Directions:%20Pour%20tequila%20%28or%20margarita,by%20prolonged%20exposure%20to%20salt.)[[4]](https://spices.com/products/the-spice-lab-tequila-shot-glasses-pink-himalayan-salt-tequila-shot-glasses-just-pour-shoot-and-bite-a-lime-naturally-anti-bacterial-perfect-for-your-bar-1#:~:text=Sale%20price,been%20added%20to%20the%20cart.)[[5]](https://steelcitysalt.com/products/pink-himalayan-salt-shot-glass#:~:text=Pink%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Shot%20Glass,dishwasher%20or%20submerge%20in%20water.)
